# Task

Priority: HIGH
Type: feature

Describe the tasks to be executed through this document.

# DNA

This document serves as the final merged system report indicating the integration of various components of the project.

# Roadmap

A roadmap outlining the future directions and objectives of the project.

# Changelog

## [Unreleased]

### Added
- Initial project setup

### Changed
- Updated dependencies

# Project Title

## Description

This is a sample project demonstrating autonomous DevOps CI/CD pipelines.

# Knowledge Base

This document acts as an AI memory repository containing all knowledge gained during project execution.

# Source Map

## auth/login.js
- Source: original repo
- Modified: YES
- Changes: JWT → Token system v2

# Version

VERSION: 1.4.2
STATUS: stable
LAST_UPDATED: 2026-05-04

name: Continuous Integration

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Run build
        run: npm install && npm run build

name: Build

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Run build
        run: npm install

name: Test

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

name: Preview

on:
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  preview:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Run preview
        run: npm run serve

name: Versioning

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  versioning:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Increment version
        run: npm version patch

name: Tagging

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  tagging:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Create tag
        run: git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git push --tags

name: Release Notes

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  generate_release_notes:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Generate release notes
        run: npm run release-notes

name: Deploy

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Deploy
        run: npm run deploy

name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Create release
        run: npm run create-release

name: Docker Build

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t myapp:${{ github.sha }} .

name: Docker Push

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  push:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Login to Docker Hub
        uses: docker/login-action@v1
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_TOKEN }}
      - name: Push Docker image
        run: docker push myapp:${{ github.ref }}

name: Hugging Face Sync

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  sync:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Sync to Hugging Face
        run: huggingface-cli repo create mymodel && huggingface-cli repo upload mymodel --path ./model
